name: avengers-assemble
description: Five skills for building expert Claude Code projects. /avengers-assemble researches the best practitioners in any domain, blends their philosophies into focused personas, and scaffolds lean project structure. /fury adds expertise as the project grows and audits for bloat. /smash restructures existing legacy setups into the lean two-tier architecture. /cap turns vague ideas into clear, prioritized action plans before the team executes. /snap audits rules and captures learnings — the project protection protocol.
